src: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it.
ja: エージェントに気を取られがちな人のための、Claude Code・Codex・Cursor・OpenCode を並列実行するネイティブ Rust/GPUI コントロールプレーン — どうせ落ち着きがないなら最適化しましょう
